business_impact.disclaimer: annual_diverted_units is a BUYER-SUPPLIED ASSUMPTION, not an Amber measurement; the recoverable-margin figure is the signed net-of-tax per-unit delta multiplied by that assumed volume. Amber measures and signs the per-unit delta; the volume is the operator's input.
